description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

ADR bodies render as <pre> raw markdown. Render them as styled HTML similar to GitHub: headings, paragraphs, lists, inline code, code blocks, links, block quotes, tables.

Plan: add Earmark dep, helper render_markdown/1 that strips the H1 (since the ADR title is already in the disclosure summary) and converts to HTML with safe defaults (escape inline HTML so a malicious ADR can't inject script tags). Add CSS for the .markdown-body elements.
title: Polish v5: render markdown bodies (ADRs etc.) GitHub-style
